narrative:
Groveport-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,101 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.8 percentage points.
